concept: Summarize / To Make the Core Clear
description: The act of giving a brief statement of the main points of something. It is the skillful process of distilling a larger whole down to its clear, essential core.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'the' (deliberate consideration), 'ki' (sharp insight, a point), and 'o' (wholeness). The word's structure suggests 'a deliberate insight into the whole.' This frames summarizing as a mindful act of perception and distillation, not just abbreviation. The sound is concise and clear.
